heading: Suspension of payment of retired pay of members who are absent from the United States to avoid prosecution
label: 2506 Suspension of payment of retired pay of members who are absent from the United States to avoid prosecution
text: Under procedures prescribed by the Secretary, the Secretary may suspend the payment of the retired pay of a member or former member during periods in which the member willfully remains outside the United States to avoid criminal prosecution or civil liability. The procedures shall address the types of criminal offenses and civil proceedings for which the procedures may be used, including the offenses specified in , and the manner by which a member, upon the return of the member to the United States, may obtain retired pay withheld during the member’s absence.section 8312 of title 5
notes: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 424a of this title
